blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
